task: Triage customer and branch complaints about missed, late, or incorrect deliveries and pickups and route each case to the right recovery action.
frequency: multiple escalations per week in busy markets
tool_today: Phone, email, contract notes, dispatch board, proof-of-delivery records
decision_content: Whether to re-run, escalate, document a service failure, or hold for branch follow-up without worsening customer impact.

task: Track driver on-yard dwell time and push branches to stage loads before truck arrival so the market loses fewer hours to waiting.
frequency: daily monitoring plus weekly branch follow-up
tool_today: GPS scheduler map, staging board, branch messages, phone
decision_content: Which delays are one-off noise versus branch habits that need escalation or resequencing.

task: Identify contracts that are still unopened or unclosed when scheduled moves are ready and push the blockage back to counter or service before dispatch time is wasted.
tool_today: RentalMan or RentalResult contract queue, dispatch board, branch messages
decision_content: Whether to hold the move, push for faster paperwork resolution, or accept an exception with downstream risk.

task: Replan the dispatch board when a driver calls out, a truck breaks down, or an urgent request changes same-day capacity across the market.
frequency: same-day disruptions several times per month
tool_today: Dispatch scheduler, GPS map, hauler contacts, phone, rental system
decision_content: Which runs to defer, consolidate, outside-haul, or re-sequence without breaking more customer promises than necessary.

task: Review weekly DOT, HOS, and DVIR exception patterns and decide which driver, truck, or branch issues need corrective action before they become audit or safety failures.
frequency: weekly compliance review plus exception follow-up
tool_today: ELD or HOS system, DVIR reports, repair tickets, driver follow-up
decision_content: Which issues need coaching, grounding, repair escalation, or branch intervention rather than simple documentation.

task: Compile the weekly and monthly logistics KPI pack for the market, including on-time performance, outside-haul spend, driver productivity, and late-return conflicts that need escalation.
frequency: weekly summary plus monthly trend review
tool_today: Dispatch dashboard, GPS reports, BI exports, spreadsheet
decision_content: Which trends are significant enough to escalate to branch managers or operations leadership and what likely driver sits behind them.
